creator: erb@insl1.etec.uni-karlsruhe.de
text:
Programs using xview dump core. (clock, imaze from ports, etc)

How-To-Repeat: 
% which clock                                                  
/usr/X11R6/bin/clock
% clock                                           
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
XView warning: Notifier error: Bad file number
zsh: 25740 segmentation fault (core dumped)  clock
